caption: The video features a man speaking at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. He is dressed in a formal suit and tie, indicating a professional setting. The man appears to be engaged in a discussion or presentation, as suggested by his hand gestures and focused expression. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, and the hashtag #MDW22 is displayed on the screen, along with the branding for "theCUBE," which likely indicates the media outlet covering the event. The background shows a modern interior with large windows, adding to the professional ambiance of the setting.
